name: isolved HCM Platform API
what_it_does: isolved HCM REST API for human capital management covering payroll, HR, benefits, and workforce management for SMB and mid-market. Enables AI agents to manage payroll processing and tax filing for employee compensation management, handle HR record management and employee lifecycle for HR operations automation, access benefits enrollment and administration for employee benefits management, retrieve time and attendance tracking for workforce management, manage ACA compliance and reporting for healthcare coverage administration, handle onboarding and offboarding workflow automation for HR process management, access performance management and goal tracking for talent management, retrieve compensation management and merit review data for HR compensation automation, manage employee self-service data for HR portal automation, and integrate isolved HCM data with ERPs, benefits carriers, and payroll tax agencies.
use_cases: Processing payroll from SMB payroll automation agents
Managing benefits enrollment from HR benefits agents
Automating onboarding from HR operations agents
Tracking attendance from workforce management agents
not_for: Large enterprise requiring SAP HCM or Workday capabilities
Single-function payroll without full HCM suite needs
PEO employer-of-record services without direct employer HCM
best_when: An SMB or mid-market employer using isolved HCM wants AI agents to automate payroll processing, benefits administration, HR record management, and workforce compliance.
avoid_when: PAYROLL COMPLIANCE RISK: isolved payroll automation must maintain FLSA, state wage, and IRS compliance — automated payroll configuration changes without payroll tax expert review creates tax liability. ACA compliance automation requires accurate employee classification and full-time equivalent (FTE) calculations; automated ACA reporting errors create IRS penalties. isolved has grown through acquisitions (Infinisource, Adjacence, Benefit Focus partnership); platform integration consistency may vary.

auth.notes: isolved uses OAuth 2.0. Developer portal at developer.isolvedpeople.com. Webhooks for HCM events. REST API with JSON. Charlotte, North Carolina HQ. Private (Accel-KKR PE). Founded as Infinisource, rebranded isolved. isolved acquired multiple companies including Benefitmall and others. 175,000+ SMB employer customers. Strong in SMB to mid-market HCM. Competes with Paychex, ADP, and UKG Ready for SMB HCM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-employee monthly subscription
pricing.notes: Charlotte, North Carolina. isolved (Accel-KKR PE). Infinisource heritage. 175,000+ SMB employer customers. Full HCM suite. Competes with Paychex Flex, ADP RUN, and UKG Ready for SMB HCM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: PAYROLL COMPLIANCE RISK: Automated payroll configuration changes must maintain FLSA, IRS, and state wage compliance; unauthorized payroll changes create tax and wage violation liability

ACA FTE calculation accuracy — ACA automated reporting requires accurate full-time equivalent calculation; isolved ACA module errors in FTE classification create IRS Employer Shared Responsibility penalties
Acquisition platform consistency — isolved has grown through acquisitions; platform integration and API consistency may vary across acquired products; verify API surface for target functionality
Benefits carrier integration — automated benefits enrollment changes must communicate to carriers via EDI 834 or direct feed; isolved-to-carrier timing must be validated to prevent coverage gaps
Payroll cutoff deadlines — automated payroll submission must respect isolved processing cutoff deadlines; late submissions miss payroll and create employee payment failures
State tax nexus management — automated employee location changes trigger state payroll tax nexus requirements; automated relocation processing must trigger state registration review
agent_readiness.security_notes: SMB/mid-market HCM. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US. Payroll and employee HR data.

security_score_components.security_notes: HCM. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US. Payroll and HR data.
